hypothesis: If the novel single-agent, marker-pdf–based end-to-end extraction pipeline with Markdown conversion, image captioning, and domain-specific prompts is applied to the nanozyme and chelate-complex articles, then it will achieve higher per-column F1 scores for structured dataset extraction than the baseline GPT-5, GPT-5 Thinking, and ChatGPT Agent, because preserving structure and applying specific extraction rules reduces error propagation across modalities.
